title: Meteors
body:
# Meteors

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC)
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/meteors?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/meteors)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

<hr>

## 📖 Description

A new challenge to your world. At unpredictable intervals, a meteorite falls from the sky, and you'll hear a distinctive sound as it approaches, building anticipation and tension.

<hr>

## ⌨️ Commands

Spawn meteor:

```mcfunction
/function meteors:meteor/spawn
```

Config (1.21.6+):

```mcfunction
/function meteors:config
```

<hr>
